Math.text: list@(X, X ^ Y, X / Y, delimited-[]@(X), absolute-value@(X), set@(X), set@(x), set@(x), set@(x), set@(x))
list@(gradient, gradient@(Psi), gradient@(Psi + X ^ Y), gradient@(delimited-[]@(Psi + X ^ Y)))
list@(divergence, divergence@(a), divergence@(a + X ^ Y), divergence@(delimited-[]@(a + X ^ Y)))
list@(curl, curl@(a), curl@(a + X ^ Y), curl@(delimited-[]@(a + X ^ Y)))
list@(d, d * x, d * x, d * delimited-[]@(3) * x, d * cosine@(theta))

Math.tex: \frac{\partial x}{\partial\qquad}\frac{\partial x}{\partial f}\qquad\frac{\partial x}{\partial\qquad}\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}\qquad\frac{\partial[}{\partial n}]{f}{x}\qquad\frac{\partial x}{\partial(}\frac{X}{Y})\qquad\frac{\partial*}{\partial f}{x}

para.p: And multiple derivatives, sorta; But only for partial:

Math.tex: \frac{\partial f}{\partial x}{y}\qquad\frac{\partial f}{\partial x}{y}{z}\qquad\frac{\partial[}{\partial 3}]{f}{x}{y}{z}\qquad\frac{\partial x}{\partial y}(f)

Math.text: list@(((d * f) / (d * x)) * y, ((delta * F) / (delta * f)) * g)
list@(bra@(phi) * ket@(psi), [as opposed to], bra@(phi) * ket@(psi))
list@(bra@(phi) * ket@(psi) * bra@(xi), [as opposed to], bra@(phi) * ket@(psi) * bra@(xi))
matrix@(Array[[, matrix@(Array[[x / y], [b]])], [matrix@(Array[[u + v + w + x + y + z, d]]), e]])
